message:
Migrate provider errors from Error::config/Error::api to Error::provider for auth diagnostic taxonomy

All existing native providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, Azure, Cohere, Gemini) previously
used Error::config for missing API keys and Error::api for HTTP errors. This made it
impossible for the diagnostic taxonomy in error.rs to correctly classify failures by
provider, since the provider identity was lost. The auth_diagnostic() classifier needs
Error::provider(provider_id, message) to route diagnostics correctly.

Error message migration (all providers):
- Missing key errors now use Error::provider("<canonical-id>", "Missing API key for ...")
  with consistent phrasing across all providers
- HTTP error responses now use Error::provider("<canonical-id>", "... API error (HTTP {status}): ...")
  instead of Error::api("... API error ...")
- Provider IDs use canonical forms: "anthropic", "openai", "azure-openai", "cohere", "google"

Affected providers:
- anthropic.rs: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing → Error::provider("anthropic", ...)
- azure.rs: AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY missing + HTTP errors → Error::provider("azure-openai", ...)
- cohere.rs: COHERE_API_KEY missing + HTTP errors → Error::provider("cohere", ...)
- openai.rs: OPENAI_API_KEY missing + HTTP errors → Error::provider("openai", ...)
- openai_responses.rs: same migration as openai.rs
- gemini.rs: GOOGLE_API_KEY/GEMINI_API_KEY missing + HTTP errors → Error::provider("google", ...)

Diagnostic test coverage in error.rs:
- Per-provider MissingApiKey classification tests (anthropic, openai, azure, cohere, gemini)
- Per-provider HTTP 401/403 → InvalidApiKey classification
- HTTP 429 quota → QuotaExceeded classification
- HTTP 500 → no auth diagnostic (correct negative)
- Provider context propagation in hints
- E2E cross-provider diagnostic validation matrix

Code quality improvements:
- copilot.rs: rustfmt formatting, clippy fixes (PoisonError::into_inner),
  api() return type → &'static str, unnecessary clone removal
- gemini.rs: all request/response types and conversion functions promoted to
  pub(crate) visibility to enable reuse by the Vertex AI provider adapter
- mod.rs: remove extraneous blank lines, update vertexai test assertion
  to match canonical "google-vertex" ID

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
